acceptanceCriteria: ADR 0001 states that GitHub immutable releases are a complementary control whose enablement is a separately authorized repository-settings decision, and that until enabled consumer policy must treat tags as mutable and pin the exact source commit and subject digests
ADR 0001's #25 packaging step requires the final archive digest to live in a detached release manifest rather than inside the archive it describes, with mix-and-match substitution tested
ADR 0001's consumer policy pins the immutable numeric repository ID and the allowed release trigger event in addition to the repository name
ADR 0001's consumer enforcement table includes a host-required CI workflow that verifies the attested CI verifier bundle before executing .rigor/rigor-ci.cjs, scoped as a CI-consumer-only boundary
CHANGELOG.md gains an Unreleased entry describing the amendment
npm run test:all, npm run bench, claude plugin validate . --strict, and git diff --check pass
note: Policy permits transmission; minimize content and re-check destination controls.
